issueTitle: Connections — The Ascension of the Lord 2026

massChanges.heading: Mass, Reconciliation and Devotions
massChanges.body: Weekend Masses continue at St Monica's: Saturday 6:00pm Vigil and Sunday 11:00am Ordinariate Mass; St Martin's: Sunday 9:30am. Weekday Masses: St Martin's Tuesday and Thursday 9:00am; St Monica's Wednesday 9:00am. Reconciliation is available 5:15pm–5:45pm Saturday and 8:45am–9:15am Sunday.

topNotices.heading: Parish Breakfast
topNotices.body: Saturday 30th May at 9:30am in St Martins Church Hall. Come hungry and gather for great food and lovely conversations. RSVP by 17th May to admin@gwparish.org.au or via the QR code on the church noticeboard. Limited seats available.

topNotices.heading: Upcoming Synod Liturgies
topNotices.body: Ecumenical Taizé Prayer on the Eve of the Synod will be held 19 May 2026 at 7:30pm at St Francis Xavier Cathedral. All are welcome to join in a special ecumenical prayer service in the Taizé style, with scripture, songs and reflections. Opening Mass of the 2026 Archdiocesan Synod will be held 29 May 2026 at 5:45pm at St Francis Xavier Cathedral. A simple meal in the hall will follow.

topNotices.heading: Laudato Si' Week
topNotices.body: 17–24 May 2026. Laudato Si' Week is a global celebration marking the anniversary of Pope Francis's landmark encyclical on caring for our common home. Sponsored by the Vatican's Dicastery for Promoting Integral Human Development, this celebration unites Catholics to listen and respond together to the cry of creation.

thisWeek.heading: Ninna Marni
thisWeek.body: Monday 18 May at 1:30pm at St Martin's Church Hall. All are welcome.

thisWeek.heading: Parish Pastoral Council
thisWeek.body: Tuesday 19 May at 7pm at St Martin's School Boardroom.

thisWeek.heading: Sacramental Program
thisWeek.body: The 2025/2026 Sacramental Program continues. Next session is Monday 25 May at 9am at St Martin's School.

thisWeek.heading: School Mass
thisWeek.body: Wednesday 20 May at 9am at St Monica's Church.

communitySchool.heading: Lectio Divina
communitySchool.body: Tuesday 26 May at 9:45am at St Martin's Church Hall. All are welcome to join for prayer and reflection on the scriptures.

communitySchool.heading: Children's Liturgy
communitySchool.body: Children's Liturgy will be offered during Masses on Saturday 16 and Sunday 17 May.

communitySchool.heading: Life in the Spirit Seminar
communitySchool.body: "Come Holy Spirit, Fall Afresh On Us!" Saturday 6th June 9:15am–4pm and Sunday 7th June 9:30am–3:30pm. Speaker: Fr Josy Sebastian MSFS. At Our Lady of the Sacred Heart Church, 420 Seaview Road, Henley Beach. Please bring your own lunch; tea and coffee provided. Enquiries and bookings: phone Pauline 0403 002 240 by 2nd June. Cost by cash donation. All welcome.
